event: message_start
data: {"type":"message_start","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_tool_fixture","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":3,"cache_creation_input_tokens":81313,"cache_read_input_tokens":48362,"output_tokens":35}}}

event: content_block_start
data: {"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_fixture","name":"Read","input":{},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"file_path\":\"/tmp/demo.md\"}"}}

event: content_block_stop
data: {"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}

event: message_delta
data: {"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":3,"cache_creation_input_tokens":81313,"cache_read_input_tokens":48362,"output_tokens":89}}

event: message_stop
data: {"type":"message_stop"}
